pi_items.source: task.json metadata and verified across all setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py scripts. Field name is consistently referenced as 'field_staff_pick' throughout the codebase.

Seed data from benchmarks/cua_world/environments/drupal_commerce_env/scripts/seed_products.php line 45, and verified against official Sony product documentation and multiple retailers (Amazon, B&H Photo). Product name, SKU (SONY-WH1000XM5), and specifications (30-hour battery, 4 beamforming microphones, noise cancellation) all match real product.

Seed data from benchmarks/cua_world/environments/drupal_commerce_env/scripts/seed_products.php line 49, and verified against official Logitech product documentation and multiple retailers (Logitech official site, Amazon, Best Buy). Product name, SKU (LOGI-MXM3S), and specifications (8K DPI sensor, MagSpeed scroll wheel, USB-C charging) all match real product.

privileged_info_summary: The task implements a 'Staff Picks' feature for a Drupal Commerce store selling electronics. The metadata specifies two real consumer products: the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones (industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery and 4 beamforming microphones) and the Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse (8K DPI optical sensor with MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling). Both products are seeded into a local Drupal database and the agent must tag them with a boolean field named 'field_staff_pick', create a filtered Block View to display staff-picked products, and place this block on the site's sidebar. All product names and specifications in the metadata are verified against real product documentation from manufacturers and retailers.
